subject: Fw: Fwd: Sikorsky S-76 New Helicopter Sales Agreement
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: LVJET@aol.com

Date: Mon, 8 Oct 2007 13:35:47 
To:DKIESQ@aol.com
Cc:gmax1@ellmax.com, kellens@earthlink.net, rkahn@nysgmail.com
Subject: Fwd: Sikorsky S-76 New Helicopter Sales Agreement


Sarah, can you print this for JE to read at your leisure. 
  
Darren, 
I have some thoughts on sale of our S76C++, as you know JE approved a net 13 million and delivery in Jan 5th 2008 to new buyer if George can produce one. 
Chris Shurkus at Sikorsky has read the news papers and is aware of our situation, he said Sikorsky is in support of us and our needs. Sikorsky is interested in our current machine to sell to an off shore buyer also. 
I think we need to negotiate the price ASAP on Air Ghislaine II,  in the attachment below, price they are asking for is $12,240.000,,,compared to our current price of 10.3M. 
 scenarios: 
option #1 - Sell our current machine for 13 Million and take a 2.7 million profit. and hope Sikorsky will sell us another machine for same price, there is a 8% price increase to current S76C++ ordered now. 
Option #2 - Let Sikorsky keep our current 76C++  we operate till Jan 5th,  and order a New carbon copy of the current model and deliver in 2009 for 10.3M. 
your thoughts, 
Larry V 
     
 




----------------
See what's new at AOL.com <http://www.aol.com?NCID=AOLCMP00300000001170>  and Make AOL Your Homepage <http://www.aol.com/mksplash.adp?NCID=AOLCMP00300000001169> .

From: "Whittaker, Raymond V      SIK" <RWhittaker@SIKORSKY.COM>
Subject: Sikorsky S-76 New Helicopter Sales Agreement
Date: Fri, 05 Oct 2007 17:36:49 GMT
To: LVJET@AOL.com, dkiesq@AOL.com
Cc: "Germon, Howard H          SIK" <hgermon@SIKORSKY.COM>, "Sartor, John              SIK" <jsartor@SIKORSKY.COM>, "Mandirola, Deb            SIK" <dmandirola@SIKORSKY.COM>, "George Reenstra" <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>

Larry/Darren

First I hope this note finds both of you well.

Please find attached the Sales Agreement for the additional S-76C++ that
you have requested. We have used to existing agreement as a model and
made only those changes that are obvious regarding periods of
performance and those Terms changed by way of Sikorsky's current
business models or required by new regulatory requirements. 

On behalf of everyone at Sikorsky, we thank all involved for their
continued trust in Sikorsky Aircraft, our products and our people. 

If you have any questions regarding the contents of the attachment or
problems with this transmission, please feel free to contact me at your
convenience.

 <<Air Ghislaine Sales Agreement AC #2 100507 issued.doc>> 

Very Best Regards


Ray Whittaker 
Manager, S-76 Business Operations 
Business Operations/Commercial Marketing 
Sikorsky Aircraft Corporation 
(203) 386-4417 (voice) 
(860) 998-7434 (fax) 
RWHITTAKER@SIKORSKY.COM

Sikorsky S-76 New Helicopter Sales Agreement

Larry/Darren

First I hope this note finds both of you well.

Please find attached the Sales Agreement for the additional S-76C++ that you have requested. We have used to existing agreement as a model and made only those changes that are obvious regarding periods of performance and those Terms changed by way of Sikorsky's current business models or required by new regulatory requirements.

On behalf of everyone at Sikorsky, we thank all involved for their continued trust in Sikorsky Aircraft, our products and our people.

If you have any questions regarding the contents of the attachment or problems with this transmission, please feel free to contact me at your convenience.
